body:
## 🤖 Solution Draft Log
This log file contains the complete execution trace of the AI solution draft process.

### 💰 **Cost estimation:**
- Public pricing estimate: $4.432284

### 📊 **Context and tokens usage:**

**Claude Opus 4.7:** (2 sub-sessions)
1. 115.5K / 1M (12%) input tokens, 10.6K / 128K (8%) output tokens
2. 105.9K / 1M (11%) input tokens, 5.4K / 128K (4%) output tokens

Total: (99 new + 199.2K cache writes + 5.6M cache reads) input tokens, 16.0K output tokens, $4.432284 cost

### 🤖 **Models used:**
- Tool: Anthropic Claude Code
- Requested: `opus`
- **Model: Claude Opus 4.7** (`claude-opus-4-7`)

### 📎 **Log file uploaded as Gist** (2200KB)
- [View complete solution draft log](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/konard/dfc2c8dfdd4bd3418589cf04fb99912f/raw/01324970047de574df72568da9910ab6ad9b24ae/solution-draft-log-pr-1779277313962.txt)

---
*Now working session is ended, feel free to review and add any feedback on the solution draft.*

## 💳 GitHub Actions Billing Limit Reached

The CI/CD jobs could not start due to billing/spending limits.

**Affected jobs:**
- audit
- helm
- go
- lint
- node
- docker-build (api, apps/api)
- docker-build (tg-bot, apps/tg-bot)
- docker-build (admin, apps/admin)
- docker-build (node-agent, services/node-agent)
- docker-build (edge, apps/edge)

**Error message:**
> The job was not started because recent account payments have failed or your spending limit needs to be increased

**Action Required:**
Please check the 'Billing & plans' section in your GitHub settings and either:
1. Add or update your payment method
2. Increase your spending limit
3. Wait for the free tier limits to reset (if applicable)

Once the billing issue is resolved, you can re-run the CI checks or push a new commit to trigger a new run.

---
*Detected by hive-mind with --auto-restart-until-mergeable flag. This is NOT a code issue - human intervention is required.*
